  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types
  2. RealVector

Uses of Record Class
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types.RealVector

Packages that use RealVector
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.continuous
Continuous-space EDA and NES/CMA-style drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.continuous
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Probabilistic models for continuous search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous.plugins
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems
Problem implementations and shared problem-level helpers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.continuous
Continuous benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.multiobjective
Multi-objective benchmark suites.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.continuous
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.mo
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.distance
Distance metrics between genotypes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
Representation implementations and validators.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.continuous
 

  • Uses of RealVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms

    Subclasses with type arguments of type RealVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    FlowEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated flow-inspired continuous EDA driver using non-linear density transforms.
    final class 
    FullCovarianceEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated full-covariance Gaussian EDA driver for correlated real-valued search.
    final class 
    GaussianDiagEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated diagonal-Gaussian continuous EDA driver.

  • Uses of RealVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.continuous

    Subclasses with type arguments of type RealVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.continuous
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BlockCovarianceEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated block-covariance continuous EDA driver for partially factorized dependence structures.
    final class 
    CemAlgorithm
    Dedicated Cross-Entropy Method (CEM) continuous driver.
    final class 
    CmaEsAlgorithm
    Dedicated CMA-ES strategy driver for full-covariance adaptive search.
    final class 
    CopulaEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated copula-based EDA driver for non-Gaussian marginals with modeled rank dependence.
    final class 
    GmmEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Gaussian-mixture EDA driver for multimodal continuous landscapes.
    final class 
    IgoAlgorithm
    Dedicated Information-Geometric Optimization (IGO) driver alias.
    final class 
    KdeEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated KDE-EDA driver using non-parametric density estimation.
    final class 
    LowRankCovarianceEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated low-rank covariance EDA driver for high-dimensional continuous optimization.
    final class 
    MimicContinuousAlgorithm
    Dedicated continuous adaptation of MIMIC-style dependency modeling.
    final class 
    PbilRealAlgorithm
    Dedicated real-coded PBIL driver with distribution updates in continuous space.
    final class 
    SNesAlgorithm
    Dedicated separable NES (sNES) driver.
    final class 
    UmdaContinuousAlgorithm
    Dedicated continuous UMDA-style driver with independent Gaussian marginals.
    final class 
    XNesAlgorithm
    Dedicated xNES driver for full-covariance natural-gradient search.

  • Uses of RealVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.continuous

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.continuous that implement interfaces with type arguments of type RealVector
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BlockCovarianceEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Block covariance EDA driver
    final class 
    CemAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Cross-Entropy Method driver
    final class 
    CmaEsAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for CMA-ES strategy driver
    final class 
    CopulaEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Copula EDA driver
    final class 
    EgnaAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for EGNA-style continuous dependency modeling.
    final class 
    EmnaAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for EMNA.
    final class 
    FlowEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for flow-based continuous EDA.
    final class 
    FullCovarianceEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for full-covariance EDA.
    final class 
    GaussianEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Gaussian diagonal EDA driver algorithm.
    final class 
    GmmEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for GMM-EDA driver
    final class 
    IgoAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Information-Geometric Optimization driver
    final class 
    KdeEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for KDE-EDA driver
    final class 
    LowRankCovarianceEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Low-rank covariance EDA driver
    final class 
    MimicContinuousAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Continuous MIMIC driver
    final class 
    MultivariateKedaAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for MultivariateKEDA.
    final class 
    PbilRealAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Real-coded PBIL driver
    final class 
    SNesAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Separable NES EDA driver
    final class 
    SpedaAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for SPEDA.
    final class 
    UmdacAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for continuous UMDA (UMDAc).
    final class 
    UmdaContinuousAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Continuous UMDA driver
    final class 
    UnivariateKedaAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for univariate KDE-EDA.
    final class 
    XNesAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for xNES EDA driver

  • Uses of RealVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous that implement interfaces with type arguments of type RealVector
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    CmaEsStrategyModel
    CMA-ES strategy model with evolution paths, rank-1/rank-mu covariance updates, cumulative step-size adaptation, and IPOP-like internal restarts.
    final class 
    CopulaBaselineModel
    Gaussian copula baseline with empirical marginals.
    final class 
    DiagonalGaussianModel
    Diagonal Gaussian model for continuous EDAs (Σ = diag(σ^2)).
    final class 
    FullGaussianModel
    Full-covariance Gaussian model (N(μ, Σ)) with Cholesky sampling.
    final class 
    GmmModel
    Diagonal-covariance Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with EM fitting.
    final class 
    KdeModel
    Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) model with Gaussian kernels.
    final class 
    NormalizingFlowModel
    Lightweight flow-based density model for continuous EDAs.
    final class 
    SNesModel
    Separable Natural Evolution Strategies (sNES) model.
    final class 
    XNesModel
    Exponential NES (xNES) full-covariance model.
    Methods in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous that return types with arguments of type RealVector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Description

    Plugin factory for lightweight normalizing-flow model.
    final class 
    SNesModelPlugin
    Plugin factory for separable NES model.
    final class 
    XNesModelPlugin
    Plugin factory for xNES full-covariance model.
